name: Corn Muffins (Satterly)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until smooth.
2. Gradually add the cornstarch, vinegar, and salt to the mixture.
3. Alternately beat in the remaining ingredients (flour, cornmeal, water) until well combined.
4. Spoon the batter into a greased muffin tin, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
